name: Baked Smoked Salmon & Feta Cheese En Croute
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a frozen pastry sheet by cutting it into a 3-inch X 8-inch rectangle and having some melted butter ready.
2. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. In a medium bowl, gently mix together the smoked salmon, cream cheese, feta cheese, slightly beaten egg, capers, finely chopped parsley, and diced scallions.
4. Roll out the pastry sheet until it is doubled in size. Brush both sides liberally with melted butter.
5. Spread the salmon mixture evenly over the pastry.
6. Roll up the pastry tightly into a log, folding the ends to seal securely.
7. Brush the top of the roll with melted butter and sprinkle generously with poppyseeds.
8. Make diagonal slashes across the roll, about half an inch deep, to allow steam to escape during baking.
9. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes or until golden brown. Serve warm.
